title: I Release Old Financial Tension and Allow Permanent Ease
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing the residual tension from years of money stress and anchoring permanent ease
excerpt: A short energy statement for the moment of completion after significant money work. The release names the tension that was carried for years; the allow names the permanent ease that the practice has built.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 70 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796). The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

content.text: A short energy statement for the completion point: when sustained money work has clearly shifted the baseline, and the task becomes anchoring that shift as permanent rather than letting it drift back. The release names the years of tension; the allow names what has been built in its place.

I am ready to release every last trace of the financial tension I have carried: the years of worry, the scarcity that felt normal, the fear that ease would not last. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.

I am ready to align with and allow permanent, lifelong ease in my financial life, a calm, trusted, steady relationship with money that I carry into every future year. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from the Day 70 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
